info.title: AbsolutePay API
info.description: The AbsolutePay REST API — accept crypto payments, send payouts, run subscriptions, and reconcile, straight from your app. Every request is authenticated with your API key plus an HMAC signature; see the Authentication guide.

value.description: available converted to the quote currency

priced.description: false when no convert quote was available

total.description: sum of priced line values, in the quote currency

expiresIn.description: seconds; clamped to a max of 1h

deliveredAmount.description: the amount actually delivered — matters for a PARTIAL settlement

fee.description: network fee deducted on this sub-order

batchId.description: the payout batch number, set once submitted

QuoteRequest.description: specify exactly one of sellAmount / buyAmount

quoteId.description: the quoteId returned by previewConvert (verified live)

merchantPlanNo.description: your reference + idempotency key for the plan

planNo.description: the plan number — pass it as planNo when subscribing a customer

priceNo.description: the price/product number the plan references

merchantSubNo.description: your reference + idempotency key for this subscription

planNo.description: the plan number (from a created subscription plan) to subscribe the customer to

nextCursor.description: echo as ?before for the next page; null on the last page

expiresAt.description: optional link expiry (epoch ms) — past it the link reads EXPIRED and won't accept payment

chain.description: optional — when set, the deposit address is minted up front for this network (invoice flow) and the response is InvoiceWithAddress instead of Invoice

kind.description: which manager owns it; defaults to invoice

InvoiceWithAddress.description: Returned by POST /v1/invoices when `chain` is set — the deposit address minted up front.

address.description: on-chain deposit address to receive payment

memo.description: destination tag/memo — present for memo chains (TON, etc.)

expiresAt.description: invoice link expiry (epoch ms), if set

CheckoutLink.description: Returned by POST /v1/checkouts — the hosted checkout page to send the payer to.

checkoutUrl.description: full hosted checkout URL (when CHECKOUT_BASE_URL is configured)

payPath.description: relative /pay/<token> path (when no base URL is configured)

kind.description: which manager owns it: a billed invoice or a shareable checkout link

customerEmail.description: set if you passed one on create

paused.description: Live/Paused — a paused link won't accept payment

activeDeposit.description: un-expired deposit to resume on reload (same address + countdown)

InvoicePublic.description: The unauthenticated hosted-checkout view — deliberately omits owner-only fields (customerEmail, opens, timestamps).

activeDeposit.description: un-expired deposit to resume on reload

nextCursor.description: echo as ?before for the next page; null on the last page

currency.description: token the payer sends; the picker spans the full catalog

payAmount.description: amount of payCurrency to send so it equals the invoice total

rate.description: 1 when paying the invoice currency; else the conversion rate

payAmount.description: exact amount to send (the order's orderAmount)

bankAccountName.description: must match the merchant's verified identity

nextCursor.description: echo as ?before for the next page; null on the last page
echo as ?before for the next page; null on the last page

PageBefore.name: before
PageBefore.description: opaque keyset cursor from a prior page's nextCursor

Unauthorized.description: Missing or invalid API key / scope

get.summary: Combined balance in one quote currency

parameters.name: quote
parameters.description: quote currency for the combined total

get.summary: Preview the fee on an order before transacting
get.description: The total fee on a given amount, before you transact.

post.description: Body requires amount, chain, merchantUserId, goodsName (terminalType/expiresIn optional). Response carries prepayId, paymentUrl, qrContent, and the per-order on-chain address.

parameters.name: Idempotency-Key
parameters.description: Retry-safe key — drives merchantTradeNo so a re-POST returns the same order, not a duplicate.

post.summary: Refund a settled order (full or partial)
post.description: Refund a (portion of a) settled checkout order. Confirmation arrives async via the PAY_REFUND callback, which reverses the accrued fees. Idempotent on refundRequestId.

get.summary: Supported chains + withdraw fee/limits for a currency

post.summary: Subscribe one of your customers to a plan (returns the authorization link)
Create a checkout — returns the hosted /pay page URL (payer picks the asset)
Create an invoice / payment link (pass `chain` to mint a deposit address up front)

201.description: Created — Invoice (no chain) or InvoiceWithAddress (chain given)

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: narrow to a settlement state (e.g. PAID for the pay-ins feed)

get.summary: Aggregate Checkout stats (active links, opens, conversion, volume)

post.summary: Live/Paused toggle for a checkout link

get.summary: Public invoice view for the hosted checkout (unauthenticated, by token)
Full pay-in asset catalog — every token × network (unauthenticated)

post.summary: Live pay-in quote for the chosen token (unauthenticated)
Mint a deposit address for the chosen asset (unauthenticated)
Register a bank (statement base64; reviewed asynchronously)
Create an off-ramp withdraw order against a quote + approved bank
Issue a prepaid gift card (funded from the workspace balance)
